title: Escape tool-package install card bpk token

source.subject: fix(pckg): escape `./@(Package.Name).bpk` token in tool-package install card

body:
Escapes the `./@(Package.Name).bpk` token in tool-package install cards so Razor/Blazor does not treat `@` as code.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `pckg`
- **Commit:** [`135f7c9`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_pckg/commit/135f7c9)
- **Subject:** fix(pckg): escape `./@(Package.Name).bpk` token in tool-package install card
- **Completed:** 2026-05-23

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `pckg-registry`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-merge-wave`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **v0.3 macro/runtime/ffi/tooling delivery** (`v03-merge-wave`).
